image_dependency: Question explicitly asks for the SMILES of the transition-state structure shown in the image.
Identifying the correct molecular structure and charges is not recoverable from text alone.
multi_step: Solver must parse the depicted chemical structure from the image and then map it to one of five SMILES choices.
The prompt mentions ignoring arrows, which adds an instruction beyond simple recognition.
This is a structured image-to-symbol matching task, but not a long calculation or extended chain of reasoning.
verifiability: Answer is a single exact short-text SMILES string that matches one listed option.
There are five explicit choices, so correctness can be checked deterministically against the option set.
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and both question and answer are present.
